function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant schema, read finance lane AGENTS files, and used exact invoice line items for calculation.
function.outcome_justification: The exact line item 'staff follow-up support' appears in three read invoice files. For records issued on or after 2026-02-01, included 220 from INV-0008 (2026-02-17) and 160 from INV-0011 (2026-04-27), totaling 380. INV-0007 (2026-01-19, 110) is before February 2026 and excluded.
